title: Samsung Unpacked 2026: all the news from the July foldable launch
summary: Following weeks of rumors and leaks, Samsung announced the Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a completely new design that’s shorter and wider than last year’s Fold, a new “Ultra” Fold, an updated Flip model, and refreshed versions of the Galaxy smartwatches.
caption: output/2026-07-22/samsung-unpacked-2026-all-the-news-from-the-july-foldable-launch.txt
